risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between aluminum and CFRP materials.
risk.mit: Use thermal interface materials and design for thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Risk of fatigue failure at rail guide grooves due to repeated deployment cycles.
risk.mit: Increase rail thickness and add stress relief features.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference between PC/104 boards and deployable rail.
risk.mit: Ensure adequate clearance and use shielded cabling.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under launch loads if fasteners are not properly torqued.
risk.mit: Implement a torque verification process during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of service access panel not being easily removable for maintenance.
risk.mit: Design with quick-release mechanisms and clear labeling.

risk.mit: Add keying or labeling to power connectors to prevent mis-mating.
